1suppecte0dm69gm.q: Is the average of Men's Not at all and Women's Not at all greater than All Results' Not at all?
1suppecte0dm69gm.e:
Add Men's Not at all value and Women's Not at all value.
Divide the added value by two.
Compare to the All results value.

1x37jzohqd666qc0.q: Is the average value of "Don't know/no opinion" in all categories equal to the difference between "Very unlikely" in "Family" and "Very unlikely" in "Local community" plus the difference between "Somewhat unlikely" in "Family" and "Local community"?
1x37jzohqd666qc0.e:
Find the Don't know/no opinion average for all categories.
Find the value of Very Unlikely of the family category minus the Very Unlikely value of the Local community.
Find the value of Somewhat unlikely the family category minus the value of the community's Somewhat unlikely value of the Local community..
Add these two values.
Compare the mean and these two values to the added value.
